task_sheet.title: Measurement and Selection Record
instructions: Use the sheet as a working record, not a paragraph worksheet.
Keep each response in the space that matches the task type.
Record only the values and selections you actually need.

tasks.label: Part A
tasks.prompt: Choose one option in each pair.

render_hints.heading: Choose one in each row
render_hints.help: Treat each pair as a compact selection, not a written response.

tasks.label: Part B
tasks.prompt: Match each measurement word to the best definition.

tasks.label: Part C
tasks.prompt: Record the values you need from the measurement brief.

tasks.label: Part D
tasks.prompt: Show your calculation and state the final number of bags needed.

tasks.label: Part E
tasks.prompt: In one short checkpoint response, say which package option seems strongest right now.

render_hints.heading: Quick checkpoint
render_hints.help: Keep this to one or two short lines.

embedded_supports: Choose or record only what the task asks for.
Keep calculations in the workspace instead of writing them as prose.
Use the checkpoint space for a short response only.
success_criteria: I kept selections compact and readable.
I recorded values in labeled fields.
I used the calculation space for working, not prose.
